translations.en: a mysterious gypsy woman wearing an ankh pendant.
translations.zh: 戴著安卡吊墜的神秘吉普賽女子。

translations.en: "My chances to visit Dr. @Cat come all too seldom."
translations.zh: 「吾拜訪@貓醫生的機會實在太少了。」

translations.en: "Seek me out later and I will speak with you."
translations.zh: 「稍後再來尋吾，吾將與汝相談。」

translations.en: "I have no time for those who are cruel to animals."
translations.zh: 「吾無暇與虐待動物之人周旋。」

translations.en: "Welcome back, Avatar."
translations.zh: 「歡迎回來，聖者。」

translations.en: "You are the Avatar. I had a vision that you would come to seek aid from me."
translations.zh: 「汝是聖者。吾曾有預兆，汝將前來向吾求助。」

translations.en: "Some know me as @Taynith. That is what you may call me."
translations.zh: 「有些人知道吾的名字是@泰妮絲。汝可如此稱呼吾。」

translations.en: "Seek not my @true name. Let 'Taynith' suffice."
translations.zh: 「莫要探尋吾的@真名。『泰妮絲』已足夠。」

translations.en: "You try my patience."
translations.zh: 「汝在考驗吾的耐性。」

translations.en: "I tell @fortunes - for a price."
translations.zh: 「吾算@命——但要收費。」

translations.en: "A gorgio - that's almost as good as being a gypsy!"
translations.zh: 「一個外人——那幾乎與身為吉普賽人一樣好了！」

translations.en: "Our @paths will cross again. I have foreseen it."
translations.zh: 「吾等的@道路將再次交會。此乃吾所預見。」

translations.en: "Captain John? Yes, he brought us a silver tablet some time ago, to deliver to the Lycaeum."
translations.zh: 「約翰船長？是的，前些時候他帶來一塊銀板，要我們送往萊西厄姆。」

translations.en: "@Zoltan took care of the deal, so he could tell you more than I."
translations.zh: 「@佐爾坦負責了那次交易，他能告訴汝的比吾更多。」

translations.en: "Ask @Zoltan about it."
translations.zh: 「去問@佐爾坦。」

translations.en: "King of the gypsies, sure as my name's Taynith."
translations.zh: 「吉普賽人之王，就如吾名泰妮絲一樣確定無疑。」

translations.en: "My path leads to @Paws, as soon as I have time to visit there."
translations.zh: 「吾的道路通往@帕斯，一旦有暇便去拜訪。」

translations.en: "My good @friend Dr. Cat lives there."
translations.zh: 「吾的好@友貓醫生就住在那裡。」

translations.en: "Ask him about the duck sometime."
translations.zh: 「找機會問問他那隻鴨子的事。」

translations.en: "Yes, ask him!"
translations.zh: 「是的，去問他！」

translations.en: "@Zoltan can tell you where it is."
translations.zh: 「@佐爾坦能告訴汝它在哪裡。」

translations.en: "I sense that you have met her already."
translations.zh: 「吾感知到汝已與她相遇。」

translations.en: "There is no need for me to direct you there. You are destined to meet her."
translations.zh: 「吾無需為汝指路。汝命中注定與她相遇。」

translations.en: "No doubt."
translations.zh: 「毋庸置疑。」

translations.en: "My advice will cost you two gold. Do you still want it?"
translations.zh: 「吾的建議需要兩枚金幣。汝仍想要嗎？」

translations.en: "Very well."
translations.zh: 「很好。」

translations.en: "Best check your purse."
translations.zh: 「最好先查查你的錢袋。」

translations.en: "Look through the books at the @Lycaeum. You might learn something useful there."
translations.zh: 「去查閱@萊西厄姆的藏書。汝或許能在那裡學到有用的東西。」

translations.en: "I charge six gold to cast my tiles. Are you interested?"
translations.zh: 「吾占卦需收六枚金幣。汝有意嗎？」

translations.en: "Very well."
translations.zh: 「很好。」

translations.en: "Best check your purse."
translations.zh: 「最好先查查你的錢袋。」

translations.en: From the folds of her cloak, she withdraws a velvet pouch.
translations.zh: 她從斗篷的褶縫中取出一個絲絨袋。

translations.en: *After shaking it gently, she casts forth three small squares of ivory, each with an image etched into its surface and a title at the bottom.
translations.zh: *輕輕搖晃後，她擲出三枚小小的象牙方塊，每枚表面刻有圖案，底部有標題。

translations.en: The tiles are:
translations.zh: 牌面為：

translations.en: "If you consult the tiles another time, perhaps they will have more to say of your @future."
translations.zh: 「若汝再次請吾占卦，也許牌面對汝的@未來會有更多啟示。」

translations.en: 'Panda', 'Coin', and 'Bead of Glass'.
translations.zh: 「熊貓」、「錢幣」與「玻璃珠」。

translations.en: Taynith says: "There is something made of glass that plays a very important role in your future, but the signs are unclear."*
translations.zh: 泰妮絲說：「有一件玻璃製成之物在汝的未來扮演極重要的角色，但徵兆尚不明朗。」*

translations.en: "Seek out @Penumbra. Her crystal ball should hold more of an affinity for this item."
translations.zh: 「去尋@潘努布拉。她的水晶球與此物的親和力應更深。」

translations.en: "If you pay her enough, she can tell you more than I."
translations.zh: 「若汝付得足夠，她能告訴汝的比吾更多。」

translations.en: 'Abyss', 'Mountains', and 'Maelstrom'.
translations.zh: 「深淵」、「群山」與「大旋渦」。

translations.en: Taynith says: "This is strange."
translations.zh: 泰妮絲說：「此事奇異。」

translations.en: *"The tiles show that to accomplish your ends, you must go down very far, then up very far, but you will not end up back where you started."*
translations.zh: *「牌面顯示，為達目的，汝必須下行極深，再上行極高，但終點並非原點。」*

translations.en: "The 'Maelstrom' indicates something important as well, but I cannot determine what it means."
translations.zh: 「『大旋渦』亦代表某些重要之事，但吾無法確定其意。」

translations.en: 'Path', 'War', and 'Rogue'.
translations.zh: 「道路」、「戰爭」與「流氓」。

translations.en: The 'War' tile is particularly striking. It depicts a dragon and a tiger, each about to bite the others tail.
translations.zh: 「戰爭」牌格外觸目驚心。上面畫著一龍一虎，各自即將咬住對方的尾巴。

translations.en: Taynith says: "Britannia is on a path towards all out war, that is plain enough."
translations.zh: 泰妮絲說：「不列顛尼亞正走向全面戰爭，此事再明顯不過。」

translations.en: "The 'Rogue' is one who would go against the wishes of his Lord to find another path."
translations.zh: 「『流氓』乃是一個不惜違抗其主公旨意、另尋他路之人。」

translations.en: 'Bead of Glass', 'Maelstrom', and 'Clever Fish'.
translations.zh: 「玻璃珠」、「大旋渦」與「聰明魚」。

translations.en: Taynith frowns. "I cannot interpret this pattern. I'm afraid you'll have to seek its meaning on your own."
translations.zh: 泰妮絲皺起眉頭。「吾無法解讀此組合。恐怕汝得自行探尋其意涵。」

translations.en: 'Shaman', 'Blademaster', and 'Clever Fish'.
translations.zh: 「薩滿」、「劍聖」與「聰明魚」。

translations.en: Taynith says: "All of these things and more must you be to find success in your quest."
translations.zh: 泰妮絲說：「此等種種乃至更多，汝皆須具備，方能在試煉中取得成功。」

translator_notes: 泰妮絲是吉普賽占卜師，神秘預知能力，用文言（「汝/吾/乃」）傳達莊重感。骨牌牌名直接翻譯。
